detail.description: Diamondbacks challenged (play at 1st), call on the field was overturned: Jordan Lawlar singles on a bunt ground ball to pitcher Travis Adams.

Jordan Lawlar reaches on a fielding error by pitcher Brett Kerry. Jordan Lawlar to 2nd. Jordan Lawlar advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by pitcher Brett Kerry.

Jordan Lawlar doubles (2) on a line drive to left fielder Wade Meckler.
